name: edge-links
description: A Cloudflare-native, single-owner URL shortener using Workers and Durable Objects.

SITE_NAME.description: A friendly name for this shortener. Example: `BWF URL Shortener`.

PUBLIC_ORIGIN.description: The public short-link domain, including `https://`. Example: `https://bwf.sh`. Leave blank when you only use the assigned workers.dev address.

DASHBOARD_HOST.description: Optional private dashboard domain, without `https://`. Example: `edge-links.bwf.sh`. Leave blank when the dashboard and links share one domain.

ROOT_REDIRECT_URL.description: Optional destination for the public domain's home page. Example: `https://furqaan.net`. Leave blank unless you use a separate dashboard domain.

LINK_LENGTH.description: Number of characters in random short links. Keep the default of `6` unless you have a reason to change it.

scripts.check: npm run types && npm run typecheck && npm test
